series_metadata.series_description: This file contains the documents associated with each closed Oil & Gas Commission file for all appeals brought before the Oil & Gas Commission. The file contains pleadings, and other documents filed with the Commission, and any documents generated by the Commission with regard to pending appeals. Where hearings have been conducted by the Commission, the file includes ay documentary evidence entered in the Record and a Transcript of the proceedings.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for five (5) years from completion of case, then reviewed by State Archives prior to disposal. ; Paper: Retain for five (5) years from completion of case, then reviewed by State Archives prior to disposal., Electronic: Archives ; Paper: Archives
